title: Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling
summary: v0.4 landed compiler waves W0–W6 (HIR-free ISLE production path, canonical ABI-v5 runtime, Linux x86-64 kits, HIR/legacy retirement, corelib gates), platform services (auth hub, tracker SQLite SOT, nexus hosting), CI/CD (pnpm cutover, Docker Hub rate-limit fix, platform delivery), and site updates (learn curriculum, platform-spec reader chrome, website book). OpenSpec catalog: 185 capabilities, 524 requirements (rev f011a8cb2e46). W7 release evidence in progress.
theme: Auth hub, web_common, tracker, nexus, CI/CD, corelib, editor DX

cutoff.rationale: Starts at v0.3 cut-off tip aaddd32 (2026-05-25). v0.4 burst through 2026-07-24 lands compiler W0–W6 Done (HIR-free ISLE, ABI-v5 kits, HIR retirement), pnpm migration, catalog rebuild, platform-spec editor fixes, learn curriculum expansion. End commit: 17442fb9 (2026-07-24).
